brand: Te Paipera i te Panui Kotahi
docTitle: Te Paipera mā te Mahere · Te Paipera i te Panui Kotahi
metaDesc: Whāia te wā o te Kawenata Tawhito, te oranga o Īhu, me ngā haerenga o Paora i runga i te mahere tūturu — i tū tūturu te Paipera ki ngā wāhi pono.

s.kicker: Te Paipera i te Panui Kotahi · Ngā Mahere
s.title: Te Paipera mā te Mahere
s.verse: “Ehara hoki i te mea he whai tā mātou i ngā kupu i titoa e te whakaaro tinihanga, i te whakapuakanga o te kaha, o te haerenga mai o tō tātou Ariki, o Īhu Karaiti ki a koutou; engari he kaititiro anō mātou ki tōna nui.” (2 Pita 1:16)
s.purpose: Ehara te Paipera i te pakiwaitara. He tuhinga tēnei mō ngā tāngata i haere i runga i ngā wāhi tūturu, ngā rā, me ngā ingoa. Whāia aua ara mā te mahere, i te raupapa o te wā — pāwhiritia tētahi tohu, pēhia rānei a ▶ hei haere māramara i ia hikoinga.
s.ot_kick: ① Kawenata Tawhito — puta noa i te wā
s.ot_h: Mai i te hanganga ki te hokinga ki Hiruhārama
s.ot_lead: Ehara i te haerenga kotahi engari ko te rerenga o te hītori whakaoranga mai i te hanganga: te hanganga me te hinganga → te waipuke me Papera → he karanga (Āperahama) → te whenua i oatitia → te Putanga → te koraha → te riringa → te kīngitanga → te wehenga → te whakaraunga → te hokinga mai.
s.je_kick: ② Kawenata Hou — te oranga o Īhu
s.je_lead: Whāia te oranga o Īhu e ai ki ngā Rongopai, i te raupapa — mai i tōna whānautanga i Petereheme, mā tōna iriiringa me tāna minitatanga i Kariri, puta i Hamaria, ki te rīpeka, te aranga, me te kakenga i Hiruhārama.
s.pa_kick: ③ Kawenata Hou — ngā haerenga o Paora
s.pa_h: Mai i Anatioka ki ngā pito o te whenua — Roma
s.pa_lead: Mai i te Petekoha i Hiruhārama, me pēhea i hora ai te rongopai ki tua o Hūria — mā Āhia Iti me Ūropi ki te puku o te emepaea. Kōwhiria tētahi o ngā haerenga e rima (tuatahi·tuarua·tuatoru + te terenga ki Roma + i muri i te tukunga), ā, whāia ngā takahanga o Ngā Mahi me ngā pukapuka i tuhia i te ara.
s.foot: Ngā puna · E whai ana ngā wāhi i te kupu o te Paipera me te matawhenua Paipera auau (me ngā ingoa o ēnei rā ina āwhina). Ko ngā tahatika, ngā awa, me ngā roto i tuhia mai i ngā raraunga matawhenua tuwhera (Natural Earth), kua whakamāmātia.
s.contact: He pātai · whakahoki kōrero — Īmēra mai

eden.name: Erene (Te Hanganga · Te Hinganga)
eden.note: Ki tētahi ao i hangaia kia tino pai rawa, ka uru mai te hara, ā, ka motuhia te here i waenga i te Atua me te tangata.
events: Te hanganga i ngā rā e ono — “he pai rawa”
Te tangata i hangaia kia rite ki te āhua o te Atua
Te hinganga, me te peinga atu i Erene
Te oati tuatahi o te rongopai — “ka kuru te uri o te wahine i te māhunga o te nākahi”

noah.name: Ararata (Te Waipuke)
noah.today: Maunga Ararata, te rāwhiti o Tākei ināianei
noah.note: Ka whakawā te Atua i tētahi ao kī tonu i te hara, heoi ka tiaki ia i te ora mā tētahi whānau kotahi.
events: He ao kī tonu i te kino
Te waipuke, me te aaka a Noa
Te kawenata o te āniwaniwa — “e kore anō he waipuke hei whakangaro”

babel.name: Te Pourewa o Papera
babel.note: Ki te whakapehapeha e whai ana ki te rangi, ka whakamararahia e te Atua tō rātou reo me ngā iwi puta noa i te whenua.
events: “Tātou ka hanga i tētahi pā me tētahi pourewa… kia whai ingoa ai tātou”
Ka whakapoauau te Atua i tō rātou reo
Ka marara ngā iwi puta noa i te whenua (Hinara — muri iho ko Papurona)

ur.name: Uru
ur.note: Ka tīmata te kōrero whakaoranga o te Paipera ki te karanga i tētahi tangata kotahi.
events: Ka karangahia e te Atua a Aperama i Uru o ngā Karari
“Ka meinga koe e ahau hei iwi nui… mā koe ka manaakitia ngā iwi katoa”
Mā te whakapono ka wehe ia i tōna whenua

haran.name: Harana
haran.note: I te ara, e whakautu ana i te karanga ki te whenua i oatitia.
events: Ka noho te whānau o Teraha ki Harana
Ka mate a Teraha
Ka anga a Aperama ki Kanaana i te 75 o ōna tau

shechem.name: Hekeme · Kanaana
shechem.note: I te whenua i oatitia ka whakatūria tētahi whānau, ā, ka tukua te kawenata ki ngā whakatupuranga.
events: Te urunga ki Kanaana, te aata tuatahi — “ka hoatu e ahau tēnei whenua ki tōu uri”
Te kawenata (Kenehi 15) · Ihaka · Hākopa
Ngā tama tekau mā rua a Hākopa — te pakiaka o ngā iwi tekau mā rua

egypt.name: Īhipa (Kohena)
egypt.today: te ngutuawa o Naera, Īhipa ināianei
egypt.note: Ka meinga tētahi whānau hei iwi nui — kātahi hei iwi pononga.
events: A Hōhepa, i hokona atu, ka piki ki te rangatiratanga o Īhipa
Ka heke te whānau katoa o Hākopa ki te oma i te matekai
Ka meinga te iwi tipu o Īharaira hei pononga

sinai.name: Maunga Hinai
sinai.note: Te whakaoranga matua o te Kawenata Tawhito — ka meinga ngā pononga hei iwi ake mā te Atua.
events: Ngā whiu tekau me te reme o te Kapenga
Ka wehea te Moana Whero, ā, ka whiti rātou
Ngā Ture Tekau, te Ture, te tāpenakara, me ngā patunga tapu

kadesh.name: Karehe (te koraha)
kadesh.note: Nā te whakaponokore ka ngaro i tētahi whakatupuranga te whenua — heoi ka noho tonu te Atua ki a rātou.
events: Ngā tūtei tekau mā rua — engari ka kāhore te iwi e whakawhirinaki
38 tau i te koraha — te mana, te kapua, me te ahi
I ngā mania o Moapa, te kauwhau whakamutunga a Mohi (Tiuteronomi)

jericho.name: Heriko
jericho.note: I te mutunga ka uru rātou, ā, ka riro i a rātou te whenua i oatitia.
events: Ka wehea a Horano, ā, ka whiti te iwi
Ka hinga ngā taiepa o Heriko
Te riringa o Kanaana me te wehenga o te whenua

shiloh.name: Hiro (Kaiwhakariterite)
shiloh.note: Kāhore he kīngi, ka mahi te katoa i tāna i pai ai — e hiahiatia ana he kīngi pono.
events: Ka whakatūria te tāpenakara ki Hiro
Te huringa o te hara–tūkinotanga–whakaoranga (Tepora, Kiriona, Hamahona)
Rutu — te pono i ngā rā pōuri, i te whakapaparanga o Rāwiri

jerusalem.name: Hiruhārama · Te Kīngitanga Kotahi
jerusalem.note: Te wā korōria o Īharaira — me te oati mō tētahi kīngi mau tonu.
events: A Hāora te kīngi tuatahi, kātahi ko Rāwiri rāua ko Koriata
Te kawenata o Rāwiri — “tōu torōna ake ake” (2 Hamuera 7)
Ka hangaia e Horomona te temepara i Hiruhārama

samaria.name: Hamaria · Te Kīngitanga Wehe
samaria.note: Ka wehe, ka heke te kīngitanga i te wā e karanga ana ngā poropiti.
events: I muri i a Horomona, te wehenga ki a Hura me Īharaira
Te karakia whakapakoko tukurua
Ka karanga a Iraia, Ihāia, Heremaia ‘hoki mai’ — ā, ka poropiti i te Mīhaia

nineveh.name: Ninewe (Ahiria)
nineveh.note: I te whakakāhoretanga i ngā whakatūpato katoa, ka hinga tuatahi te raki.
events: Ninewe, te tāone matua o Ahiria
Ka hinga te kīngitanga raki ki a Ahiria (722 i mua i a te Karaiti)
Ka tonoa a Hona ki Ninewe

babylon.name: Papurona
babylon.note: Te pō pōuri rawa — heoi ka mau tonu te oati o te whakahōnga.
events: Ka hinga a Hiruhārama, ka tahuna te temepara (586 i mua i a te Karaiti)
Ka whakaraua a Hura ki Papurona
Raniera rāua ko Ehekiera — te whakapono me ngā kitenga i te whakaraunga

susa.name: Huhana (Pāhia)
susa.note: Ahakoa i te puku o tētahi emepaea etene, ka tiaki te Atua i tōna iwi.
events: Ka hinga a Papurona i a Pāhia
Ka whakaora a Ehetere i ngā Hūrai i te whakangaromanga
Ka īnoi a Nehemia i te aroaro o te kīngi, ā, ka tonoa

return.name: Te Hokinga ki Hiruhārama
return.note: Ka hoki mai rātou, ka hanga anō — engari kāhore he kīngi kua tae mai. Kei te tatari rātou ki te Mīhaia.
events: E toru ngā ngaru hokinga mā te ture a Hairuha (Herupapera 538 · Etera 458 · Nehemia 444)
Ka hanga anō te temepara, ka whakahoutia ngā taiepa o Hiruhārama
Maraki — ka mutu te Kawenata Tawhito: “Ka ungā atu e ahau tāku karere”

bethlehem.name: Petereheme
bethlehem.note: Ka tae mai te Mīhaia i oatitia ki te pā o Rāwiri — te Kupu i whakakikokikotia.
events: I whānau ki Petereheme, te pā o Rāwiri
Ka kauwhau ngā anahera i te rongo ki ngā hēpara
Ka haere mai ngā Māki ki te koropiko

nazareth.name: Nahareta
nazareth.note: Ka tipu ake te Atua hei tangata i tētahi pā noa.
events: I whakatipuria i te whare o tētahi kāmura
I te tekau mā rua, e pātai ana, e whakautu ana i te temepara
Muri iho ka whakakāhoretia i te whare karakia o tōna pā

jordan.name: Te Awa o Horano
jordan.today: te wāhi raro o Horano ināianei
jordan.note: Ka tīmata tāna minitatanga ki te iwi — ka hīri te rangi i a ia hei Tama.
events: Ka iriiria e Hoani
Ka heke iho te Wairua ānō he kūkupa — “Ko taku Tama tēnei e aroha nei”
Ka hinga i a ia ngā whakamatautau e toru a Hātana i te koraha

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: I tāna tohu tuatahi ka whakaatu ia i tōna korōria.
events: He manuhiri i tētahi mārena
Ka meinga te wai hei wāina — tāna tohu tuatahi
Ka whakapono ana ākonga ki a ia

sychar.name: Haika (Hamaria)
sychar.note: Te ara o te minitatanga moata — mā Hiruhārama, ā, ki Hamaria whakahāwea.
events: Ka horoia e ia te temepara i Hiruhārama
I te pō, ko Nikorima — “Me whānau hou koe”
He wai ora mō tētahi wahine Hamaria

capernaum.name: Kaperenauma
capernaum.today: te tahataha o te roto o Kariri ināianei
capernaum.note: Te tūrangawaewae o te minitatanga i Kariri — ka tūtaki ki konei te karanga, te whakaako, me te whakahē.
events: Ka karanga i ngā kaihao ika, ā, ka noho ki konei
Te Kauwhau i te Maunga — “Ka koa te hunga rawakore i te wairua”
Ngā kupu whakarite o te rangatiratanga — me te pikinga o te whakahē

galilee.name: Te Moana o Kariri
galilee.note: Mā tōna mana ki runga i te taiao ka whakaatu ia ko wai ia.
events: “Kia mārie, whakamutua” — ka whakamārie ia i te tūpuhi
Ka whāngai i te 5,000 mā ngā taro e rima me ngā ika e rua
Ka haere ia i runga i te wai

caesarea_p.name: Hiharia Piripai
caesarea_p.note: Ka mārama ngā ākonga ko ia te Karaiti, ā, ka tuwhera te ara o te rīpeka.
events: Te whakaaetanga a Pita — “Ko te Karaiti koe, ko te Tama a te Atua ora”
Ka poropiti tuatahi ia i tōna matenga me tōna aranga
Ka puta kē tōna āhua i te korōria i runga i te maunga

jericho.name: Heriko
jericho.note: I te ara ki runga ki Hiruhārama, ka rapua e ia te hunga ngaro.
events: Ka homai e ia te titiro ki a Paratimiuha matapō
Ka karanga ia i a Hakiaha te kaikohi takoha
“I haere mai te Tama a te tangata ki te rapu, ki te whakaora i te mea i ngaro”

bethany.name: Petani
bethany.note: Ka whakaatu ia i tōna mana ki runga i te mate i te ata o tōna wiki whakamutunga.
events: Ka whakaarahia e ia a Raharuha i te urupā — “Ko ahau te aranga, te ora”
Ka whakawahia ia e Meri mō te tanumanga
Nā tēnei tohu ka pakeke ake te whakaaro ki te patu i a ia

jerusalem.name: Hiruhārama
jerusalem.note: Te tihi e tohu ana te Paipera katoa — te rīpeka, te aranga, te kakenga.
events: Te urunga wikitōria; ka hurihia anō e ia ngā tēpu o te temepara
I te Hapa Whakamutunga ka horoia e ia ngā waewae o ngā ākonga
Ka mate ia i te rīpeka
Ka ara i te rā tuatoru, kātahi ka kake ki runga

antioch.name: Anatioka
antioch.note: Te hāhi tono i tīmata ai, i hoki ai hoki te mihana ki ngā Tauiwi.
events: I te īnoi ka wehea e te Wairua a Panapa rāua ko Haora
Te hāhi i huaina tuatahi ai ngā whakapono ko ngā ‘Karaitiana’
Te tīmatanga o ngā haerenga tuatahi, tuarua, tuatoru

seleucia.name: Herukia
seleucia.note: Te tauranga o Anatioka — ka rere rātou ki Kaiperu.

salamis.name: Harami (Kaiperu)
salamis.note: Te tū tuatahi ki Kaiperu — te kauwhau i ngā whare karakia.

paphos.name: Papaho
paphos.note: Ka whakaaturia te mana ki te hunga e whakahē ana i te rongopai.
events: Ka whiua a Erima te kaimākutu ki te matapō
Ka whakapono a Herekiu Pauruha te tino rangatira
Mai i konei ka arahi ‘Paora’

perga.name: Pereka
perga.note: He tauranga i Pamapuria — ka hoki a Hoani Māka i konei.

pantioch.name: Anatioka o Pihiria
pantioch.note: Ka tuwhera te rongopai ki ngā Tauiwi.
events: He kauwhau roa mō te hītori whakaoranga i te whare karakia
Ka koa te tini o ngā Tauiwi, ā, ka tango i te kupu
Ka peia ki waho e te whakahē

iconium.name: Ikoniuma
iconium.note: He tokomaha ka whakapono, engari nā te whakatoinga ka anga atu rātou.

lystra.name: Raihitara
lystra.note: I whakanuia hei atua, kātahi ka akina ki te kōhatu.
events: Ka whakaora i tētahi tangata kōpā mai i te whānautanga
Ka whai te mano ki te patu whakahere ki a rāua hei atua
I akina ki te kōhatu, ka mahue hei tūpāpaku, heoi ka whakatika ia

derbe.name: Rerepe
derbe.note: He tokomaha ngā ākonga ka meinga; ka hoki rātou i ō rātou takahanga ki te whakakaha i ngā hāhi.

troas.name: Toroa
troas.note: Te wāhi hurihanga i anga tuatahi ai te rongopai ki Ūropi.
events: He kitenga o tētahi tangata o Makeronia
“Whiti mai, āwhinatia mātou”
Ka whiti tonu rātou ki Ūropi

philippi.name: Piripai
philippi.note: Te hāhi tuatahi o Ūropi — ka wikitōria te rongopai ahakoa i te whare herehere.
events: Ka whakapono a Riria, te kaihoko papura
Ka wetekina tētahi kōtiro pononga matakite
Ngā waiata i waenganui pō, he rū whenua, ka whakaorangia te whare o te kaitiaki herehere

thess.name: Teharonika
thess.note: Ka rūrū te kupu i te pā, ā, ka pupū ake te whakahē.
events: Ka whakawānanga i te whare karakia i ngā hāpati e toru
“Ko ēnei nāna nei i whakatakahuri te ao”
Ka wehe puku rātou i te pō

berea.name: Peria
berea.note: Ko te hunga ‘rangatira’ i āta rangahau i te kupu mā rātou anō.
events: Ka tango rātou i te kupu me te hihiko
Ia rā ka rapu rātou i ngā karaipiture hei whakamātau
He tokomaha ka whakapono

athens.name: Atene
athens.note: I te pā o ngā mātanga whakaaro ka kauwhautia e ia te ‘atua kāhore i mōhiotia’.
events: Ka pōuri ia i te pā kī tonu i ngā whakapakoko
I runga i te Areopaka ka kauwhau ia mō te Kaihanga me te aranga
I tāwaia, heoi ka whakapono ētahi torutoru

corinth.name: Koriniti
corinth.note: Ka noho ia mō te tau me te haurua, e whakatō hāhi ana i tētahi pā kino.
events: Ka hanga tēneti me Akuira rāua ko Pirihira
“Kaua e wehi… kei a koe hoki ahau”
He tokomaha o Koriniti ka whakapono, ka iriiria

ephesus.name: Epeha
ephesus.note: Te puku o te haerenga tuatoru — ka hora te kupu puta noa i Āhia.
events: Te whakaako ia rā mō ngā tau e rua i te whare o Tairanu
Ka tahuna ngā pukapuka mākutu; ngā mahi kaha
Ka whakaohohia e Rimitiriu te kaimahi hiriwa te ngangau

miletus.name: Miretu
miletus.note: He poroporoaki roimata ki ngā kaumātua o Epeha.
events: “Tiakina te hāhi i hokona e ia ki ōna toto ake”
Ka tangi ngā kaumātua, i te mōhio e kore rātou e kite anō i a ia

caesarea.name: Hiharia
caesarea.note: Mō ngā tau e rua ka whakamārama ia i te rongopai i te aroaro o ngā kāwana me tētahi kīngi.
events: Ngā whakawākanga i te aroaro o ngā kāwana, o Pirika rāua ko Petuha
Tāna whakamārie i te aroaro o Kīngi Akaripa
“Ka karanga ahau ki a Hīha” — ka anga ki Roma

jerusalem.name: Hiruhārama
jerusalem.note: I hopukina i te temepara, ka tīmata tōna ara hei mauhere.
events: Ka hopukina e te mano i te temepara
Ka whakamārie ia i te aroaro o te rūnanga
Hei tangata nō Roma, ka tonoa ki Hiharia i raro i te tiaki

myra.name: Maira
myra.note: Ka whakawhiti rātou ki tētahi kaipuke nō Arehanaria e anga ana ki Roma.

fairhaven.name: Ngā Kokoru Ataahua (Kariti)
fairhaven.note: Kāhore i whakarangona te whakatūpato a Paora kia mutu te rere.

crete.name: Kariti
crete.note: I muri i tōna tukunga, te motu i waiho ai e ia a Taituha hei whakatika i ngā hāhi.
events: Ka waiho a Taituha hei whakarite kaumātua i ia pā
Ka tono kia tū ngā kaiārahi kāhore he kupu, e pono ana
Ka tuhia te pukapuka ki a Taituha

malta.name: Merita
malta.note: Mā roto i te tūpuhi me te pakarutanga o te kaipuke, ka mau tonu te oati a te Atua.
events: Ka pakaru te kaipuke i te ‘hau raki-mārangai’, heoi ka ora katoa ngā 276
I ngaua e te neke, kāhore ia i mate
Ka whakaora ia i te hunga māuiui o te motu

syracuse.name: Hairakuha
syracuse.note: Ka noho rātou mō ngā rā e toru ki Hihiri.

puteoli.name: Puteori
puteoli.note: Ka ū rātou ki Itari, ā, ka tūtakina e ngā hoa whakapono.

rome.name: Roma
rome.book: Ngā Mahi 28 · Ngā Pukapuka Herehere · 2 Timoti
rome.note: Ka tae te rongopai ki te puku o te emepaea i te mutunga — ehara i te mutunga engari he tīmatanga.
events: E rua ngā tau i raro i te mauhere ā-whare, e kauwhau māia ana i te rangatiratanga
Mai i konei ka tuhia e ia ngā Pukapuka Herehere (Epeha·Piripai·Korohe·Pirimona)
Muri iho ka mauheretia anō, ka tuhia e ia a 2 Timoti, ā, ka mate hei kaiwhakaatu — “Kua whawhaitia e ahau te whawhai pai, kua omakia e ahau taku omanga”

journeys.j5: Te haerenga tuarima · i muri i te tukunga
